description_long: This is an ornate gold ring featuring a large, faceted red gemstone as its centerpiece, flanked by two smaller red gemstones set into decorative side mounts. The band is thick and robust, with intricate metalwork connecting the central setting to the side stones, giving the piece a regal and vintage appearance. The gemstones are octagonal in shape and are held securely by prong settings, which add to the ring's elaborate design. The gold band has a polished, glossy finish, reflecting light and enhancing the brilliance of the red stones. The overall construction suggests a luxurious and eye-catching piece, suitable for formal occasions or as a statement accessory. The design motif is geometric, with symmetrical lines and angular gemstone cuts.
description: A gold ring with a large central red gemstone and two smaller red side stones, featuring intricate geometric metalwork and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the circular gold band and the arrangement of the three red gemstones, with the central stone most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the octagonal shape of the central gemstone and the prong setting, with the band appearing thick and sturdy.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view mirroring view 0, emphasizing the symmetry of the band and the side gemstone mounts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the octagonal central gemstone and the detailed prong setting.
